payload.answer: Ingestion of the article at https://example.com/missing was aborted due to a 404 network error. No content was processed or stored in memory.

entity_resolution.reason: No entities require resolution; failure is self-documenting.

memory_cards.statement: Failed to fetch article at URL: https://example.com/missing (HTTP 404: Network error).
Article ingestion aborted due to unrecoverable fetch failure. No content was extracted or stored.

details: HTTP 404 error encountered during fetch attempt.
No content extracted; memory state unchanged.
Action: Aborted ingestion per system policy for unrecoverable failures.

repair_options: Verify URL correctness and retry fetch.
Check network connectivity or proxy settings.
Confirm article exists at the provided URL (e.g., via manual inspection).
